onboarding.page1: Shyira ku rwego rwisumbuye ubushobozi bw'ikigo cyawe hamwe na Performance Management/Analytics.
onboarding.page2: Menya abakozi b'indashyikirwa, vumbura impano zihenze, kandi wimakaze imbaraga z'abakozi.
onboarding.page3: Fungura ubushobozi bwo kubona ibyavuyemo bihamye kandi bigufi.
